mapper.insert:
SELECT USER_ACCOUNT_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO USER_ACCOUNT (USER_ID, LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD, NICKNAME) VALUES (#{userId}, #{loginId}, #{password}, #{nickName})
INSERT INTO USER_INFO (USER_ID, EMAIL, NAME, PHONE, GENDER, BIRTHDATE) VALUES (#{userId}, #{email}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{gender}, TO_DATE(#{birthDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USER_ACCOUNT WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CAFE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
